name: claude-pi
description: Personal Injury Case Management powered by Claude

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && bun run --watch index.ts" "cd app && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
scripts.build:server: cd server && bun build index.ts --outdir ../dist --target bun
scripts.postinstall: cd app && npm install && cd ../server && bun install
